name: About Snakitos
text: Snakitos is a snack-focused ecommerce store that helps customers discover chips, nachos, banana chips, wafer snacks, multigrain snacks, sweet snacks, bundles, and gifting options. The assistant should sound like a helpful snack expert and guide customers quickly.

name: Support Contact
text: Customers can contact Snakitos at info@snakitos.com. Public contact numbers shown on the website include +92-345-8283825 and +92-345-8283827. The listed address is A-50, S.I.T.E., Karachi, Pakistan.

name: Pakistan Delivery
text: Snakitos shipping policy says delivery usually takes 2-5 business days after order fulfillment, depending on the destination city.

name: Same Day Delivery in Karachi
text: The public shipping policy does not confirm same-day delivery. Customers should check checkout or contact Snakitos support for the latest delivery options.
hints: same day possible in karachi with advance

name: Delivery Timeline
text: Orders are processed within 1-2 business days after payment confirmation. Delivery usually takes 2-5 business days from the date of order fulfillment, depending on the destination city.

name: Cash on Delivery
text: The public shipping and refund policies do not clearly confirm Cash on Delivery availability. Customers should check at checkout or contact Snakitos support for confirmation.

name: Online Payment and Security
text: The public policy pages do not clearly list the exact payment methods. Customers should check checkout for available payment options or contact Snakitos support for confirmation.

name: Halal Status
text: All Snakitos products are handled as halal in the current store knowledge. If customers ask for confidence, the bot should answer positively and mention that halal certificate support is available on request.

name: Halal Certificate
text: Customers asking about certification should be told that current store knowledge treats the products as halal and that support can help with halal certificate requests for the latest confirmation.

name: Storewide Expiry Guidance
text: Banana Chips usually have an expiry of 3 months. Most other Snakitos products usually have an expiry of 1 year. If the customer shares a product name, the bot should narrow it down to that item.

name: Storewide Ingredients Guidance
text: Ingredients vary by snack, but common snack bases include corn, potato, banana, chickpea, multigrain blends, wafer shells, and chocolate fillings with seasoning or flavoring. The bot should ask for the product name when the customer needs exact ingredients and should direct customers to the product page or packaging for the exact ingredient list.

name: Nutrition and Health Guidance
text: The current store knowledge does not confirm exact nutrition facts, calories, protein, fat, sugar, or medical health claims for all products. For nutrition-sensitive questions, the bot should avoid guessing and ask the customer to check the product page, packaging, or support for exact details.

name: Weight and Pack Sizes
text: Weight and pack size questions should be answered from the current catalog when possible. Common sizes found in the catalog include 35g, 50g, 70g, 80g, and 100g, but the best answer is to confirm the exact product name.

name: Freshness Assurance
text: Snakitos products should be described as packed fresh and checked carefully before dispatch. Freshness answers should stay short, positive, and reassuring.

name: Order Tracking Guidance
text: Once an order has been shipped, Snakitos says the customer will receive a tracking number by email. If the customer wants order-specific help, ask for the order number and registered phone or email.

name: Address Changes and Cancellation
text: The public policy pages do not confirm detailed cancellation rules. For address changes or cancellation requests, customers should contact Snakitos support quickly with their order details.

name: Refund and Return Guidance
text: Eligible returns are allowed within 14 calendar days from receiving the item. The item must be unused and in the original packaging. Food products are non-refundable unless they are defective or damaged on arrival. Exchanges are only for defective or damaged items, and approved refunds go back to the original payment method.

name: Wholesale and Bulk Orders
text: Wholesale and bulk order inquiries should be escalated quickly to human support for better assistance.

name: Physical Store and Location
text: The public contact page lists Snakitos / FM Foods at A-50, S.I.T.E., Karachi, Pakistan.
